entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

entry.title: 关于github没有贡献值的问题
entry.content: 关于github没有贡献值的问题需要设置email地址与github上面的相同,否则不计算贡献值 查看提交信息点击进commit页面 1https://github.com/DarkCodeMaster/nlp/commit/845a9c382ff5f8e1cc1146bb00fa2232f30b3bde 后面加上 1.pathch 就可以看到提交信息 12345678910111213From 845a9c382ff5f8e1cc1146bb00fa2232f30b3bde Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001From: DarkCodeMaster <rfy1997@qq.com>Date: Tue, 13 Feb 2018 09:11:11 +0800Subject: [PATCH] add chapter2--- chapter2.py | 0 1 file changed, 0 insertions(+), 0 deletions(-) create mode 100644 chapter2.pydiff --git a/chapter2.py b/chapter2.pynew file mode 100644index 0000000..e69de29 查看/设置用户名和email1234git config --global user.name[name]git config --global user.email[email] 12git config --global user.name namegit config --global user.email email 要注意的是: 用户名和email地址都没有引号 更改完再提交,贡献值成功更新 问题解决

entry.title: my first post
entry.content: 这是第一篇博客,好激动Hello Hexo! 试试看显示更多的功能
